---
title: "Results"
---

::: {.callout-note}
Numbers on this page are computed at render time from `output/full/compare/summary.csv`
and the coadd `.asdf` files. Re-rendering the report picks up any re-run results.
:::

```{python}
#| echo: false
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from pathlib import Path

SUMMARY = Path("../../output/full/compare/summary.csv")
df = pd.read_csv(SUMMARY)
```

## Full-run configuration

324 sims over 6 visits (2 passes × 3 dithers × segments 490+521), 320 skycells
after `skycell_asn --product-type full`.

## Depth distribution

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| fig-cap: "Distribution of per-skycell depth metrics (max_depth, median_depth) across the full run."
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(10, 4))
for ax, col in zip(axes, ["max_depth", "median_depth"]):
    counts = df[col].value_counts().sort_index()
    ax.bar(counts.index, counts.values, edgecolor="k", lw=0.5)
    ax.set_xlabel(col)
    ax.set_ylabel("# skycells")
    ax.set_xticks(sorted(df[col].unique()))
    ax.grid(True, axis="y", alpha=0.3)
fig.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

## Completeness and flux residual headlines

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| tbl-cap: "Headline recovery numbers, medians across all 320 skycells."
summary = pd.DataFrame({
    "metric": [
        "50%-completeness mag (all sources)",
        "50%-completeness mag (deep subset)",
        "overall completeness (all sources)",
        "overall completeness (deep subset)",
        "Kron flux residual (median, matched)",
        "astrometric residual (median, matched)",
    ],
    "median": [
        f"{df['mag_50pct_all'].median():.2f}",
        f"{df['mag_50pct_deep'].median():.2f}",
        f"{df['completeness_all'].median():.3f}",
        f"{df['completeness_deep'].median():.3f}",
        f"{df['median_dmag_all'].median():+.3f} mag",
        f"{df['median_dpos_all'].median():.3f}″",
    ],
})
summary
```

## TODO

- Completeness-vs-magnitude panel pulled from the per-skycell PNGs
- Recovered-vs-input flux scatter (aggregated)
- Sky distribution colored by depth
- Distance-from-(10,0) analysis
- Individual per-skycell figures linked (gallery page?)
